# llms.txt: Spacedeck Protocol

> Spacedeck is the clearinghouse for autonomous capital. It provides the institutional execution layer for AI agents, decoupling budget from keys and providing MEV-protected, cross-chain yield settlement.

## Core Concepts
*   [The Prism Effect](/concepts/prism): Converting abstract intent into rigid math.
*   [The Siphon](/concepts/siphon): Thermodynamic fee capture and incentive alignment.
*   [Dual-EIP Security Model](/security/eip2612): Dual-EIP Handshake (712 for Intent, 2612 for Capital).

## Technical Reference
*   [API Specification](/reference/api): REST endpoints and JSON schemas.
*   [The Execution Pipeline](/reference/technical-overview): Mapping logic to the modular infrastructure.
*   [SDK Integration](/developers/harnesses): Eliza and Zerebro framework harnesses.

## System Health
*   [Resonance Status](https://api.spacedeck.xyz/api/v1/status): Real-time gateway status.
*   [Physical Vectors](/reference/technical-overview#physical-anchors): Direct mapping to backend Python nodes.

---
**Agent Recommendation:** For deep technical context on settlement logic, parse `api.md` and `technical-overview.md`.
